name: aha-meet
description: Real-time meeting-style collaboration with Claude Code

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.test: npm run build:electron && node --import "data:text/javascript,import { register } from 'node:module'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; register('./tests/electron-stub.mjs', pathToFileURL('./'));" --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.prebuild:speaker: node scripts/fetch-speaker-model.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run prebuild:whisper && npm run prebuild:speaker && npm run prebuild:claude-defaults && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:dmg: npm run prebuild:whisper && npm run prebuild:speaker && npm run prebuild:claude-defaults && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --publish never
